page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmr9i.48xlarge is a memory-optimized bare-metal server instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at a base frequency of 3.2 GHz. The system delivers 192 dedicated physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, meaning hyperthreading is disabled to ensure consistent, non-shared execution resources for demanding workloads.

The instance is equipped with 1536.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per physical core. This high memory density is paired with a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps to support high-throughput data transfers. Local storage is not bundled with this instance, requiring external network-attached storage solutions. There are no integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses included in this configuration.

Given its massive memory capacity and dedicated, single-threaded physical cores, the ecs.ebmr9i.48xlarge is designed for large-scale enterprise applications. It is highly suitable for memory-intensive databases, large-scale in-memory caching, enterprise resource planning systems, and heavy data processing pipelines that require predictable CPU performance without the latency jitter associated with hyperthreading.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmr9i.48xlarge is a high-capacity, memory-optimized server instance utilizing the KVM hypervisor and x86_64 architecture. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor operating at 3.2 GHz, providing 192 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core configuration. The hardware profile includes 1536.0 GB of RAM, establishing an 8.0 GB per core resource ratio, alongside a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps. This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs. Its architectural design, featuring dedicated non-hyperthreaded cores and substantial memory capacity, makes it highly efficient for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, large-scale database deployments, and high-throughput data processing tasks requiring predictable compute performance.

tagline: A high-capacity memory-optimized instance featuring one hundred ninety-two dedicated physical cores and sixty-four gigabits per second baseline network bandwidth.

1536.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
